name: Compass
description: A drawer of old compasses, needles trembling toward different norths — every redraw lets them settle on a new bearing.

code.style: --needle: @p(var(--color2), var(--color2), var(--color1), var(--color3)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 10%; border: calc(30px / @Y) solid var(--color1); border-radius: 50%; opacity: @rand(0.55, 0.95); box-sizing: border-box; transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 42%; top: 14%; width: 16%; height: 72%; background: var(--needle); clip-path: polygon(50% 0%, 78% 50%, 50% 100%, 22% 50%); transform: rotate(@rand(360deg)); transition: ease 700ms; } } @random(0.2) { :after { background: var(--color4); } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
